case_title: ARKETHA MUNIR VS. FIRAHS LAND TRUST ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-08-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-19-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-04-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2020 CONTINUED TO JUN-02-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
